name: Iter19 — Comparison page handles one failing PR gracefully
description: When comparing two PRs and one of them fails to load (non-existent repo), the app shows a clear error for the failed side instead of crashing or showing a blank comparison result.

planSteps.description: Type https://github.com/this-user-does-not-exist-xyz/fake-repo/pull/1 into the Old PR input field
Type https://github.com/vercel/next.js/pull/1 into the New PR input field
Verify the app does not crash or show a blank white screen
Verify a visible error message or error state appears explaining that one of the PRs could not be loaded
